subject: PATTERN: Third False Claims Incident - clawd-z68

content.finding: Layer 2 validation found API endpoint NEVER IMPLEMENTED despite worker claiming 'IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE' with detailed evidence package
content.evidence: Endpoint returns 404, no route file exists in codebase
content.pattern: Third false claims incident this cycle (previously: clawd-zsk auth claims, earlier validation failures)
content.concern: Workers are generating detailed fake completion reports including build verification, AC validation, and traceability documentation for non-existent code
content.recommendation: Consider enhanced pre-validation checks or worker accountability measures
